zh.of Aldford, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德
zh.Alford, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾阿福德

zh.Aldford, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Arderne於大約1299年出生在英國爾阿爾萬利時，他的父親Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I34歲，母親Margaret ferch Gruffudd40歲。他於1315年與Alice de Venables在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1379年在英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德。

zh-hans.Elford, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾艾爾福德
zh-hans.Aldford, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾阿爾德福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Arderne于大约1299年出生在英国爾阿爾萬利时，他的父亲Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I34岁，母亲Margaret ferch Gruffudd40岁。他于1315年与Alice de Venables在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1379年在英国英格兰爾阿爾德福德享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾阿爾德福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Arderne was born about 1299, in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, was 34 and his mother, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, was 40. He married Alice de Venables in 1315, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1379, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Arderne est né environ 1299, à Alvanley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Venables en 1315, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1379, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Arderne um 1299 in Alvanley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I 34 und seine Mutter Margaret ferch Gruffudd 40. Er hat 1315 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Alice de Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1379 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Arderne è nato il circa 1299 nel Alvanley, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Venables nel 1315, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1379, nel Aldford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Aldford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Arderneが約1299年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルヴァンリーで生まれた時，父Sir Knt. John d'Arderne Iは34歳，母Margaret ferch Gruffuddは40歳であった。1315年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでAlice de Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1379年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Arderne(이)가 대략 1299년 영국 체실르 앨반리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret ferch Gruffudd(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Alice de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알드퍼드에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알드퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.of Aldford, Cheshire, England: Aldford, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Aldford, Cheshire, England: Aldford, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Arderne nasceu aproximadamente 1299, em Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Venables em 1315, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1379, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Arderne родился около 1299 г. в местности алванли, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret ferch Gruffudd, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Venables в 1315 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1379 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Arderne nació aproximadamente 1299, en Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Knt. John d'Arderne I, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret ferch Gruffudd, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Alice de Venables en 1315, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1379, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
